channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: TIAA CEO Thasunda Brown Duckett leads a retirement revolution backed by $1.5 trillion
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: OpenAI's balance sheet remains the most mysterious and consequential in business
item.description: Blogger Ed Zitron and the Financial Times reported that OpenAI's 2025 financials appear quite rough.

item.title: Cohere CEO on G7 leaders' choice: sovereign AI or digital serfdom
item.description: Relying on a few centralized AI providers is like depending on one nation for oil, he says.

item.title: The art of the bail: Iran got what it wanted. Did the U.S.? Everyone is judging Trump’s MIA MOU
item.description: Everything you need to know before you reach the office this morning.
